## User problem

Link the approved issue. Describe the problem a user has today and the workaround
they are currently carrying.

Closes #

## Acceptance criteria

List behavior someone can observe. An internal implementation detail is not an
acceptance criterion by itself.

- [ ]

## Smallest viable change

Explain why this scope is needed now, which alternatives were rejected, and
which speculative behavior remains out of scope under YAGNI.

## Verification

List tests for the owning behavior and any crossed system boundary.

```text
command -> result
```

## Compatibility

- Changed contracts, state, storage, protocol, CLI, GUI, TUI, or installation behavior:
- Migration or rollback plan, when needed:
- Affected matrix cells not run and why:

If this pull request claims a performance improvement, use the performance
template and evidence contract instead.

## Safety and responsibility

- [ ] No credentials, private session data, unsafe provider logs, or generated local state are included.
- [ ] A human is the primary submitter and accepts responsibility for correctness, licensing, provenance, verification, and the statements in this pull request.
- [ ] I have the right to submit all included material under the repository license.
